meta.dc:title: Permission required for affixing matter to fences, etc

section.heading: Permission required for affixing matter to fences, etc

content.p: No person shall paint, post, put up or display any sign, bill, poster, picture, lithograph, map, plat, sample, or other device for advertising purposes of any kind, upon any billboard, fence, post, pole, wall, building or tree within the city without the express permission of the occupant, owner, lessee, or person having possession thereof, except as hereinafter provided.
